appraisal_events.evidence: « Robert de Saint-Loup ici ! Mais je n'ai pas même eu un mot de lui ; je crois que je ne l'ai pas vu depuis Balbec. »
appraisal_events.explanation: Mme de Villeparisis signals distance and a lack of contact from Robert, undercutting the mother's pretense and locally excluding him from favor.

status_effects.explanation: His aunt’s remark publicly marks his absence and lack of attention, signaling reduced inclusion in her valued circle.
